entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the primary crop studied for stay-green phenotypes

entities.name: STAY-GREEN PHENOTYPE
entities.description: A crop phenotype characterized by delayed degreening and green cotyledon color

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand drought conditions

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL CONTENT
entities.description: The level of nutrients present in the crop

entities.name: GREEN COTYLEDON COLOR
entities.description: A trait where mature dry seeds maintain a green color

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL ADAPTATIONS
entities.description: The ability of a plant to adjust to its environment, such as dry conditions

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL VALUE
entities.description: The quality and quantity of nutrients in the crop

entities.name: DELAYED DEGREENING
entities.description: Extended chlorophyll retention in the plant

entities.name: MENDEL'S I LOCUS
entities.description: A locus in garden pea associated with cotyledon color

entities.name: GARDEN PEA
entities.description: The crop where Mendel's I locus was first identified

entities.name: SGR PROTEIN
entities.description: Protein involved in chlorophyll catabolism

entities.name: CASTGR1
entities.description: The chickpea ortholog of Mendel's I locus, associated with the stay-green phenotype

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CATABOLISM
entities.description: The biological process of breaking down chlorophyll

entities.name: DRY ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by low water availability

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PERFORMANCE
entities.description: Overall productivity and yield characteristics of the crop

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available to the plant in its environment

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of carbon gain to water loss in a plant

entities.name: WATER USAGE
entities.description: The amount of water consumed by the plant

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC PIGMENTS
entities.description: Pigments involved in photosynthesis, including carotenoids

entities.name: PROVITAMINOGENIC CAROTENOIDS
entities.description: Nutrients important for human nutrition, increased in stay-green types

entities.name: HUMAN NUTRITION
entities.description: The process of providing the human body with necessary nutrients

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of crops through genetic means
